summary: Addressed systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES for M4-AUTO-ENGAGEMENT-SIEGE-001. Added save/load event-tail parser support for sim.m4-field-engagement-resolved and sim.m4-siege-choice-applied, including reasonCodes, casualty/loss fields, status fields, and credit/reputation hook arrays. Added regression coverage for save/load parsing of new M4 combat events and player/AI parity for sim.apply-m4-siege-choice. Task status is REVIEW and route_to is systems_architect.

tests_run.result: Modified packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts, tests/sim-core-m4-auto-engagement-siege.test.ts, project task JSON; new R2 REVIEW handoff JSON in project/messages/outbox.
Node and Worker-compatible hashes matched for hello, command/query, and save/load canaries.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; 31 root test files/212 tests passed; web package 1 file/3 tests passed.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M4-AUTO-ENGAGEMENT-SIEGE-001
tests_run.result: JSON OK; task status REVIEW and route_to systems_architect.

decisions: P1 fixed inside sim-core only: parseSavedDomainEvent now accepts both new M4 combat event kinds written by domainEventToRecord.
P1 regression uses a minimal runtime with M4 combat eventTail records, intentionally avoiding save-format or M4 snapshot persistence changes.
P2 fixed with player/AI parity coverage for invest-blockade plus assault through sim.apply-m4-siege-choice and matching authoritative world state hash.
No manual battle, tactical/3D UI, diplomacy/peace, multiplayer/server, client UI, save-format, content, or out-of-scope systems were added.
risks: R3 risk remains active because this task changes authoritative sim-core command/event parsing and M4 combat state behavior.
M4 world snapshot persistence remains outside this task; this R2 fix covers event-tail serialization compatibility only, per reviewer instruction not to touch packages/save-format.
requested_action: Review the R2 fixes for the P1 save/load event-tail parser gap and P2 siege player/AI parity coverage. Do not mark ACCEPTED/CLOSED until reviewer approval.
